tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
searchByRef: Search by ref, category, child name...
tellUsWhat: Tell us what happened so we can help keep everyone safe.
recordDetails: Record details of a safeguarding concern or behavioral incident.
describeWho: Can you describe who it was?
tellUsWhatHappened: Can you tell us what happened?
coordinatorNotified: Has the Safeguarding Coordinator been notified?
searchByNameOrGroup: Search by name or use group buttons above...
tellUsInYourWords: Tell us what happened in your own words...
describeWhatHappened: Describe what happened, who reported it, and any actions already taken...
describePersonPlaceholder: e.g. tall, brown hair, wears glasses...
sexualPupilHint: Someone touched you in a way you didn't like...
disclosurePendingDetail: The school has requested parental permission for you to view full incident details. Some information is currently redacted.
parentDeclinedDetail: The parent has declined to share full details of this incident with additional staff.
disclosureNotRequestedDetail: A safeguarding coordinator must request parental disclosure permission before you can view full incident details. Pupil names and sensitive information are redacted.
staffDisclosureDetail: The safeguarding team has requested your permission to share information about your child with additional staff members. This helps staff provide appropriate support. You can approve or decline — your decision will be recorded. Disclosure permission affects in-platform visibility only. It does not restrict the school's ability to take immediate safeguarding action where necessary.
approvedDisclosure: You have approved staff disclosure for this incident.
declinedDisclosure: You have declined staff disclosure for this incident.
requestDisclosureDetail: This will ask the parent for permission to share incident details with additional staff.
disclosureRequested: Disclosure permission requested — awaiting parent response
parentSummaryPlaceholder: What parents will see (no other children's names)...
parentSummaryNote: This summary is what parents see. Never include other children's names.
tier3Desc: Immediate response required. High severity safeguarding risk.
tier2Desc: Review required within 24 hours. Moderate risk.
incidentClosedMsg: This incident has been reviewed and closed by the school.
schoolAwareMsg: The school is aware and taking appropriate action.
otherPupilsConfidential: Other pupils were involved. Names are kept confidential to protect all children.
noDescriptionReview: The school is reviewing this incident. A detailed summary will be shared once the review is complete.
stillBeingReviewed: This incident is still being reviewed. You will be notified when there are updates.
reportSubmittedPupilMsg: Thank you for telling us. A trusted adult in school will read this and decide how to help. If you feel very scared or unsafe right now, tell an adult you trust straight away. You are safe.
classifiedSerious: This incident has been classified as serious. Follow the protocol guidance below.
incidentRecorded: The incident has been recorded. The safeguarding team will be notified if escalation is required.
howAreYouFeeling: How are you feeling about it?
howWasChildFeeling: How was the child feeling? (if known)
howBecameAware: How did you become aware of this?
otherSource: Other source (parent report, another staff member, etc.)
